articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked July 2026: How to watch
articles.description: Samsung's next Galaxy Unpacked event is just around the corner, and the company is expected to take the wraps off a bunch of new devices. Based on the rumors and leaks we've seen so far, Samsung's next generation of foldables will likely be the stars of the show. Samsung is expected to show off a […]
articles.author: Emma Roth
